import React from 'react'; const PatientCard = () => { const patientData = { name: 'Vinay Varma', age: 65, patientId: 'PT-12345', procedure: 'Total Knee Arthroplasty', procedureCode: 'CPT-27447', diagnosis: 'Severe Osteoarthritis, Right Knee', diagnosisCode: 'M17.11', insurance: 'Humana Medicare Advantage', insuranceId: 'HUM-MA-001' }; return (
{/* Header with Icon */}

Patient Information

High Priority
{/* Patient Name */}
Patient Name
{patientData.name}, {patientData.age}y
{/* Patient ID */}
Patient ID
{patientData.patientId}
{/* Procedure */}
Procedure
{patientData.procedure}
{patientData.procedureCode}
{/* Diagnosis */}
Diagnosis
{patientData.diagnosis}
{patientData.diagnosisCode}
{/* Insurance */}
Insurance
{patientData.insurance}
{patientData.insuranceId}
{/* Status Footer */}
Pending PA
); }; export default PatientCard;
